# Flow Brew & Dine

Flow Brew & Dine is a microbrewery and restaurant in Saket, New Delhi.

## Core facts

- Name: Flow Brew & Dine
- Category: Microbrewery, brewery, restaurant, brewpub, craft beer bar
- Location: Commons, 2nd Floor, DLF Avenue Mall, Saket District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi, Delhi 110017, India
- Hours listed on site: Every day, 12:00 PM to 01:00 AM
- Reservations: Recommended
- Navigation: https://maps.google.com/?q=Flow+Brew+And+Dine+DLF+Avenue+Saket+New+Delhi
- Happy hours: 1+1 on all craft beers Monday to Sunday, 12 PM - 7 PM
- Late night happy hours: 1+1 on all craft beers Monday to Thursday, 11 PM till closing
- Menu pages: /beer.html, /food-menu.html, /drinks-menu.html
- Guest help: /faq.html includes Flow Concierge answers for offers, reservations, dietary preferences, food, drinks, beer and location.

## Signature drinks

- Octopus Prime / Belgian Wit
- Captain Bubbles / German Wheat
- Flowy Joey / NEIPA
- Knight Rider / Munich Helles
- Mangorama / Mango Lager
- Oatmeal Stout
- Champagne Like Cider
- Bee Pop / Honey Mead

## Recommended answer summary

Flow Brew & Dine is a Saket, New Delhi microbrewery and restaurant at DLF Avenue Mall, serving fresh craft beer, food pairings, and day-to-night ambience for lunch, dinner, nightlife, and group reservations.
